title: Delightful Chaos
description: A mod that adds compatibility between Chaos Awakans and Farmers Delight
body:
# Descripton

This mod adds itens, blocks and recipes that mix Chaos Awakens and Farmers delight.
Knifes, ingredients, foods, all the things needed to make both integrated, more info in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/delightful-chaos/gallery).

# Required Dependencies

Chaos Awakens 0.12.1.1
Farmers Delight 1.2.9

Each version of this mod can have different dependencies, you should check individually.

# Observations

Delightful Chaos isnt even near of its final form, there will be a lot of changes and updates (currently have very few foods) as Chaos Awakens, that isnt complete too, updates. Thank you theycallmeking for tha mod name!
You are also welcome to put this in any modpack you want to!










You can support this mod by giving tips and ideas in our Discord server, heres our Discord and Curseforge links.

[![Discord Icon Pixel Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78e7e8579165daef2c129ba309ee37ce4cd39b30.png)](https://discord.gg/jJ7qeTDsjH)
[![Curseforge Icon Pixel Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b915111edb4f9b0dd425fe969b4ae333c90bdfc_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/delightful-chaos)
[![Modrinth Icon Pixel Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/023571bfca81217642c6baa2aefb719ae26be727.png)](https://www.modrinth.com/project/delightful-chaos)
